ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wind_tunnel_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the wind tunnel */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the wind tunnel */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the wind tunnel */,
  "airspeed_range" TEXT /* Airspeed range of the wind tunnel */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the wind tunnel */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the wind tunnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the test type (e.g., subsonic, supersonic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_tunnel_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test run (e.g., subsonic, supersonic) */,
  "tunnel_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind tunnel configuration used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_tunnel_tests_tunnel_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("tunnel_config_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_tunnel_tests_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the data point belongs to */,
  "position" REAL /* Position data point was collected at */,
  "x" REAL /* X coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the data point */,
  "z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the data point */,
  "mean_cp" REAL /* Mean pressure coefficient value */,
  "rms_cp" REAL /* RMS pressure coefficient value */,
  "max_cp" REAL /* Maximum pressure coefficient value */,
  "min_cp" REAL /* Minimum pressure coefficient value */,
  "mean_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the mean pressure coefficient value */,
  "rms_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the RMS pressure coefficient value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the analysis result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the analysis result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the analysis result (e.g., pressure coefficient, force coefficient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot generated */,
  "plot_file" TEXT /* File path to the plot file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the plot (e.g., line plot, scatter plot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test data the publication is based on */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test data the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the report */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the report */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES wind_tunnel_tests ("test_id")
)
